scripts.app:prepare: npm run build && npm run cap:assets && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:assets: npm run assets:source && npx capacitor-assets generate --ios --android
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run build && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run build && npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug-apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release-apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
